market: AI remains a real multi-year buildout, but market leadership is rotating from capex scale to cash-flow-quality execution.
tech: Most monetizable today: inference-efficiency, workflow-embedded copilots, and compliance-ready enterprise deployment; least proven: broad autonomous agent replacement in regulated workflows.
risk: Top risks are capex outrunning monetization, export-control regime shifts, and power/interconnection bottlenecks delaying usable capacity.
